description: Fix Cartoon Profile Picture Conversion — make cartoon conversion work by switching from base64 to blob URLs, adding fallback when token is missing, and increasing timeout

userStories.title: Use blob URL instead of base64 for cartoon conversion
userStories.description: As a user uploading a profile picture, I need the cartoon conversion to use the publicly accessible Azure Blob Storage URL instead of base64 data URIs so the Replicate API can reliably fetch and process the image.
acceptanceCriteria: CartoonService interface in services/api/src/services/cartoon-service.ts updated: cartoonize method signature changed from (imageBuffer: Buffer, mimeType: string) to (imageUrl: string) returning Promise<Buffer>
ReplicateCartoonService.cartoonize() in services/api/src/services/replicate-cartoon-service.ts sends the image URL string directly in the Replicate prediction input.image field — no base64 encoding
ReplicateCartoonService no longer imports or uses Buffer.toString('base64') or constructs data URIs
Upload endpoint in services/api/src/routes/users.ts constructs the blob URL via getBlobUrl() after uploading original.webp and passes it to cartoonize(blobUrl)
Migration script scripts/migrate-cartoon-pictures.ts constructs blob URLs and passes them to cartoonize() instead of passing buffers
All existing cartoon-service.test.ts tests updated to call cartoonize(url) with a URL string instead of (buffer, mimeType)
All existing users-profile-picture.test.ts tests updated: mockCartoonize called with a URL string, assertions updated accordingly
Typecheck passes
Tests pass

userStories.title: Add graceful fallback when Replicate token is missing
userStories.description: As a developer working without a Replicate API token, I need profile picture uploads to still succeed by skipping cartoon conversion and using the original image as the avatar.
acceptanceCriteria: New PassthroughCartoonService class in services/api/src/services/replicate-cartoon-service.ts (or its own file) implements CartoonService interface and returns null from cartoonize() to signal skip
createCartoonService() factory in services/api/src/routes/users.ts checks process.env.REPLICATE_API_TOKEN: returns ReplicateCartoonService if set, PassthroughCartoonService if not
A warning is logged via logger.warn() when PassthroughCartoonService is created, indicating cartoon conversion is disabled
Upload endpoint detects null return from cartoonize() and uses the optimizedBuffer directly as avatar.webp (uploads same buffer to both original.webp and avatar.webp paths)
Profile picture upload returns 200 with profilePictureUrl even when token is missing
Unit tests in users-profile-picture.test.ts verify passthrough behavior: mock returns null, avatar.webp gets original buffer
Typecheck passes
Tests pass

userStories.title: Increase Replicate API timeout to 60 seconds
userStories.description: As a user uploading a profile picture, I need the Replicate API timeout increased from 30s to 60s so cartoon conversion succeeds even during model cold starts.
acceptanceCriteria: TIMEOUT_MS constant in services/api/src/services/replicate-cartoon-service.ts changed from 30_000 to 60_000
Timeout error message updated to say '60 seconds' instead of '30 seconds'
Timeout test in cartoon-service.test.ts updated: advances timers by 61_000ms and expects error message with '60 seconds'
Typecheck passes
Tests pass
